evidence.snippet: ![Survey-Grade Unmanned Aerial LiDAR](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/lidar-f.jpg)![With industry-leading LiDAR systems, we acquire consistent data and generate precise models -- even through dense vegetation.](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/lidar-b.jpg)

items.notes: Core service is ultra-high-resolution spatial data acquisition using LiDAR and metric camera payloads deployed on their hybrid UAS.

evidence.snippet: Utilizing customized hybrid UAS with survey-grade sensors and in-house control solutions, we are your versatile and reliable partner for surveying and modeling.

![Customized Hybrid Multi-Rotor UAS](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/uas-f.jpg)![Our made-to-measure UAS provide for maximum mission time, efficiency and flexibility, as well as superior data quality.](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/uas-b.jpg)

items.notes: Orthodrone builds and operates its own customized hybrid multi-rotor UAS with proprietary technology.

products_categories.notes: Primarily a drone service provider operating for clients; also develops proprietary customized hybrid UAS for its own use. Services page not fetched — secondary category mix could expand.

evidence.snippet:
We offer advanced, ultra-high-resolution spatial data acquisition and scientific analyses services for your industry or research needs.
Utilizing customized hybrid UAS with survey-grade sensors and in-house control solutions, we are your versatile and reliable partner for surveying and modeling.
Our on-site spatial data services revolutionize asset management for the energy, transport and infrastructure sectors.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Orthodrone operates its own customized hybrid UAS to deliver spatial data acquisition, LiDAR surveys, photogrammetry and inspections for clients. Primary positioning is as a UAS services and geospatial solutions company, not a product seller.

evidence.snippet: ![Survey-Grade Unmanned Aerial LiDAR](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/lidar-f.jpg)![With industry-leading LiDAR systems, we acquire consistent data and generate precise models -- even through dense vegetation.](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/lidar-b.jpg)

![Ultra-High Resolution Photogrammetry](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/photogrammetry-f.jpg)![Utilizing our onboard processing unit (OPU), we simultaneously control multiple cutting-edge metric camera payloads.](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/photogrammetry-b.jpg)

![Customized Hybrid Multi-Rotor UAS](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/uas-f.jpg)![Our made-to-measure UAS provide for maximum mission time, efficiency and flexibility, as well as superior data quality.](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/uas-b.jpg)

products.notes: No named product SKUs on the homepage; the vendor lists service offerings. Services page skipped — may contain more detail on specific service packages or UAS products.

evidence.snippet:
Sharper Shape
Orthodrone has provided sharp, unmanned LiDAR data for our projects since 2019, utilizing customized hybrid UAS.
Happy to work with such a talented and energetic team!

Netze BW
The high point density of Orthodrone’s UAV-based LiDAR provides a high-resolution overview of our assets and the surrounding vegetation.
Their online viewer gave us direct access to the clouds of powerlines, masts and terrain, which made it possible to share the information with our staff in the blink of an eye.

readiness.notes: Actively delivering services to paying clients across multiple industries (energy, ports, scientific research). Multiple client testimonials confirm operational track record.

tagline: German service provider offering customized hybrid multi-rotor UAS, survey-grade LiDAR, and ultra-high-resolution photogrammetry for infrastructure inspection and geospatial analysis. Operates proprietary onboard processing unit (OPU) for multi-payload control. Active in energy, transport, maritime, and research sectors with demonstrated cold-climate and offshore capability. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; no major US prime contracts identified in public record.
